untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of fundamental news events, news sentiment classification, and comparison to historical magnitude distributions. These require external news data feeds and sentiment analysis not available in the allowed indicator list. Market response weakness (30th percentile of similar-magnitude moves) requires news-event clustering and conditional historical analysis. Approximated with volume weakness and ATR compression as proxy for underreaction, but this does not capture the core fundamental news logic.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_1 is fundamentally a news-response contrarian signal requiring external data. Translated weak market response as reduced volume relative to 20-day average combined with low volatility (ATR compression), which proxies for market indifference/underreaction. Exit uses ATR expansion (2x initial volatility) as proxy for market finally responding. Position sizing 2-3% and 3-4 day hold encoded in stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max. Context-dependent direction preserved. Original source text appears truncated and does not contain the specific mechanics needed for full implementation.
